✦ Module 3 ✦

🔥

The Four Sacred Suits

The Minor Arcana

The 56 Minor Arcana cards map the everyday landscape of human experience across four elemental suits. While the Major Arcana speaks to the grand themes of life, the Minor Arcana addresses the situations, relationships, thoughts, and choices that fill our days.

✦ Learning Objectives

  • ✦ Master all four suits and their elemental correspondences (Fire, Water, Air, Earth)
  • ✦ Learn the numerological significance of each card number (Ace through 10)
  • ✦ Understand how each suit relates to specific life areas and situations
  • ✦ Read complete Minor Arcana spreads confidently

The Four Elements

🔥

Wands

Fire · Passion, creativity, career, ambition

InspirationDriveActionCreativityAmbition
💧

Cups

Water · Emotions, relationships, dreams, intuition

EmotionLoveIntuitionDreamsHealing
⚔️

Swords

Air · Thoughts, communication, conflict, truth

MindTruthConflictCommunicationClarity
🪙

Pentacles

Earth · Material world, money, body, nature

MoneyHealthWorkNatureAbundance

Numerology in the Minor Arcana

Ace (1)

New beginnings, pure potential

2

Balance, choice, duality

3

Growth, collaboration, creativity

4

Stability, structure, foundation

5

Challenge, conflict, change

6

Harmony, healing, support

7

Reflection, assessment, faith

8

Mastery, movement, power

9

Near completion, integration

10

Completion, transition, legacy

🔥

Wands

Fire · Passion, creativity, career, ambition

Ace of Wands

creation · willpower · inspiration

Creation, willpower, inspiration, desire, new initiative

Two of Wands

future planning · progress · decisions

Future planning, progress, decisions, discovery

Three of Wands

progress · expansion · foresight

Progress, expansion, foresight, overseas opportunities

Four of Wands

celebration · joy · harmony

Celebration, joy, harmony, relaxation, homecoming

Five of Wands

conflict · disagreements · competition

Conflict, disagreements, competition, tension, diversity

Six of Wands

success · public recognition · progress

Success, public recognition, progress, self-confidence

Seven of Wands

challenge · competition · protection

Challenge, competition, protection, perseverance

Eight of Wands

movement · fast paced change · action

Movement, fast-paced change, action, alignment

Nine of Wands

resilience · courage · persistence

Resilience, courage, persistence, test of faith, boundaries

Ten of Wands

burden · extra responsibility · hard work

Burden, extra responsibility, hard work, completion

Page of Wands

exploration · excitement · freedom

Exploration, excitement, freedom, adventure, enthusiasm

Knight of Wands

energy · passion · inspired action

Energy, passion, inspired action, adventure, impulsiveness

Queen of Wands

courage · confidence · independence

Courage, confidence, independence, social butterfly, determination

King of Wands

natural-born leader · vision · entrepreneur

Natural-born leader, vision, entrepreneur, honour

💧

Cups

Water · Emotions, relationships, dreams, intuition

Ace of Cups

love · new relationships · compassion

Love, new relationships, compassion, creativity

Two of Cups

unified love · partnership · mutual attraction

Unified love, partnership, mutual attraction, relationships

Three of Cups

celebration · friendship · creativity

Celebration, friendship, creativity, collaborations

Four of Cups

meditation · contemplation · apathy

Meditation, contemplation, apathy, reevaluation

Five of Cups

regret · failure · disappointment

Regret, failure, disappointment, pessimism

Six of Cups

revisiting the past · childhood memories · innocence

Revisiting the past, childhood memories, innocence, joy

Seven of Cups

opportunities · choices · wishful thinking

Opportunities, choices, wishful thinking, illusion

Eight of Cups

disappointment · abandonment · withdrawal

Disappointment, abandonment, withdrawal, escapism

Nine of Cups

contentment · satisfaction · gratitude

Contentment, satisfaction, gratitude, wish come true

Ten of Cups

divine love · blissful relationships · harmony

Divine love, blissful relationships, harmony, alignment

Page of Cups

creative opportunities · curiosity · possibility

Creative opportunities, curiosity, possibility, dreaming

Knight of Cups

creativity · romance · charm

Creativity, romance, charm, imagination, beauty

Queen of Cups

compassionate · caring · emotionally stable

Compassionate, caring, emotionally stable, intuitive, in flow

King of Cups

emotionally balanced · compassionate · diplomatic

Emotionally balanced, compassionate, diplomatic

⚔️

Swords

Air · Thoughts, communication, conflict, truth

Ace of Swords

breakthroughs · new ideas · mental clarity

Breakthroughs, new ideas, mental clarity, success

Two of Swords

difficult decisions · weighing up options · an impasse

Difficult decisions, weighing up options, an impasse, avoidance

Three of Swords

heartbreak · emotional pain · sorrow

Heartbreak, emotional pain, sorrow, grief, hurt

Four of Swords

rest · relaxation · meditation

Rest, relaxation, meditation, contemplation, recuperation

Five of Swords

conflict · disagreements · competition

Conflict, disagreements, competition, defeat, winning at all costs

Six of Swords

transition · change · rite of passage

Transition, change, rite of passage, releasing baggage

Seven of Swords

betrayal · deception · getting away with something

Betrayal, deception, getting away with something, acting strategically

Eight of Swords

negative thoughts · self-imposed restriction · imprisonment

Negative thoughts, self-imposed restriction, imprisonment, victim ment...

Nine of Swords

anxiety · worry · fear

Anxiety, worry, fear, depression, nightmares

Ten of Swords

painful endings · deep wounds · betrayal

Painful endings, deep wounds, betrayal, loss, crisis

Page of Swords

new ideas · curiosity · thirst for knowledge

New ideas, curiosity, thirst for knowledge, new ways of communicating

Knight of Swords

ambitious · action-oriented · driven to succeed

Ambitious, action-oriented, driven to succeed, fast-thinking

Queen of Swords

independent · unbiased judgement · clear boundaries

Independent, unbiased judgement, clear boundaries, direct communicatio...

King of Swords

mental clarity · intellectual power · authority

Mental clarity, intellectual power, authority, truth, ethical

🪙

Pentacles

Earth · Material world, money, body, nature

Ace of Pentacles

a new financial or career opportunity · manifestation · abundance

A new financial or career opportunity, manifestation, abundance

Two of Pentacles

multiple priorities · time management · prioritisation

Multiple priorities, time management, prioritisation, adaptability

Three of Pentacles

teamwork · collaboration · learning

Teamwork, collaboration, learning, implementation

Four of Pentacles

saving money · security · conservatism

Saving money, security, conservatism, scarcity, control

Five of Pentacles

financial loss · poverty · lack mindset

Financial loss, poverty, lack mindset, isolation, worry

Six of Pentacles

giving · receiving · sharing wealth

Giving, receiving, sharing wealth, generosity, charity

Seven of Pentacles

long-term view · sustainable results · perseverance

Long-term view, sustainable results, perseverance, investment

Eight of Pentacles

apprenticeship · repetitive tasks · mastery

Apprenticeship, repetitive tasks, mastery, skill development

Nine of Pentacles

abundance · luxury · self-sufficiency

Abundance, luxury, self-sufficiency, financial independence

Ten of Pentacles

wealth · financial security · family

Wealth, financial security, family, long-term success, contribution

Page of Pentacles

manifestation · financial opportunity · skill development

Manifestation, financial opportunity, skill development, new job

Knight of Pentacles

hard work · productivity · routine

Hard work, productivity, routine, conservatism

Queen of Pentacles

nurturing · practical · providing financially

Nurturing, practical, providing financially, a working parent

King of Pentacles

wealth · business · leadership

Wealth, business, leadership, security, discipline, abundance

🎯 Activity: Four Suits Spread

Separate your deck into its four suits. Shuffle each pile separately while focusing on that element's energy. Draw one card from each pile and lay them out together.

Ask: "What is the current state of my Fire (Wands), Water (Cups), Air (Swords), and Earth (Pentacles) energy?" Journal about each card and how it reflects your current elemental balance.

📓 Worksheets

  • ✦ Elemental Self-Assessment — rate your elemental balance 1-10
  • ✦ Suit Balance Check-In — a monthly spread to track your elemental energies

💬 Discussion Prompts

  • Q:Which suit feels most dominant in your life right now?
  • Q:How do the four elements show up in your daily experiences?
  • Q:Which suit do you find most challenging to interpret?
